releases.author: DuckTapeKiller
releases.description:
# Release v1.0.3

This release introduces build configuration updates, safety wrappers for asynchronous event handlers in the settings UI, and various CSS style refinements for better appearance and consistency.

## What's Changed
* **UI & Styling Enhancements**:
  * Cleaned up obsolete progress bar styles in settings panels.
  * Standardized small UI font sizes by replacing hardcoded `11px` values with the system-wide CSS variable `var(--font-ui-small)`.
  * Refined specificity for buttons, metric boxes, and confirmation modal windows (`.modal.btm-confirmation-modal-window`) to prevent layout issues in different Obsidian themes.
* **Stability Improvements**:
  * Wrapped setting action callbacks in `runAsync()` helper functions to ensure safe execution of asynchronous operations within the settings tab.
* **Build System & Dependencies**:
  * Streamlined build configuration in `esbuild.config.mjs` by resolving core Node.js built-in modules dynamically rather than relying on the third-party `builtin-modules` package.
  * Cleaned up unused dependency tree packages.

releases.author: DuckTapeKiller
releases.description: Polished code to comply with Obsidian review.
releases.name: 1.0.2 — Obsidian Compliant

releases.author: DuckTapeKiller
releases.description:
## Release Notes - v1.0.1

This update focuses on improving dashboard organization and expanding bulk tag editing capabilities.

### New Features
- **Tag Rename Options**: New collapsible section that groups all renaming tools for a cleaner interface.
- **Batch Rename**: Tool to rename multiple tag pairs simultaneously using a dedicated table.
- **CSV Support**: Support for bulk tag restructuring by uploading CSV files (old_tag, new_tag columns).
- **Nest Tags**: New functionality to organize your taxonomy by moving existing tags under a new hierarchical prefix.
- **Delete tags with file**: Upload a file with mutltiple tags to be deleted all at once. 

### Fixes and Improvements
- **Robust Validation**: Fixed an issue where tags declared only in frontmatter were sometimes ignored during validation.
- **Case-Insensitivity**: Tag validation is now fully case-insensitive across all bulk operations.
- **UI Adjustments**: Improved button alignment and font scaling in the dashboard for better visual consistency.

releases.author: DuckTapeKiller
releases.description:
# Bulk Tag Manager v1.0.0 (ARCHITECTURE RE-DESIGNED)

Initial release. A comprehensive tag and front matter management plugin for Obsidian.

## Core Operations

- **Rename** tags across frontmatter and body with automatic child tag propagation.
- **Merge** multiple tags into a single canonical tag with deduplication.
- **Delete** tags (including children) from all files in scope.
- **Pattern Rename** using regex for advanced restructuring.

## Standardisation

- Bulk case conversion (lowercase / uppercase) and separator normalisation (kebab / snake).
- Convert tag format between YAML list and inline array.
- Convert wiki link properties between YAML list and inline array.
- Clean front matter formatting (remove unnecessary quotes, trim whitespace).
- Flatten diacritics and strip special characters.

## Analytics

- Real-time dashboard with tag counts, case consistency, separator consistency, format breakdown, nesting depth, and location stats.
- Automatic detection of case duplicates with one-click merge.
- Invalid tag detection with automatic and manual repair.
- Orphaned tag detection with configurable threshold.
- Empty tag field detection.

## Safety

- Protected tags with wildcard support to exclude critical tags from all operations.
- Scope filtering by include/exclude folders and file path regex.
- Full operation history with file-level undo.
- Confirmation prompts on all destructive actions.
- Code block skipping to prevent modification of tags inside fenced code.

## Convenience

- Tag aliases for automatic correction on save.
- Context menu on tags in the tag pane, editor, reading view, and metadata panel.
- Drag and drop in the tag pane to restructure tag hierarchy.
- Tag page creation and navigation.
- Searchable, sortable tag hierarchy tree.
- Tag list generation to markdown.
- Six Command Palette commands for direct access.
